negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_129
prompt: A wide shot of an outdoor soccer field, enclosed by a tall green fence, situated within a suburban area with multi-story residential buildings visible in the background. The sky is partly cloudy, allowing ample sunlight to illuminate the scene. The field is covered with artificial turf, showcasing a vibrant green color. Five men are present on the field; three players, all wearing orange shirts and gray pants, are positioned near the goalpost, while two other players, one dressed in a dark blue shirt and black shorts and one dressed in a dark blue shirt and black sweatpants, stands closer to the camera. A soccer ball is placed on the ground near the player in the dark blue shirt, who appears to be preparing for a kick-off or passing maneuver. The players seem relaxed and focused, enjoying their game in this open, sunny environment.  As the video progresses, the man in the dark blue shirt and black sweatpants steps forward and kicks the soccer ball. The ball rolls across the field, and the players in orange shirts begin to react. One player in orange runs towards the ball, while another in the distance appears to be positioning himself for a potential play. The man in the dark blue shirt continues to walk, observing the movement of the ball and the other players. The scene captures the dynamic interaction between the players as they engage in the game, with the ball now in motion and the players actively responding to its trajectory.  In the final frame, the man in the dark blue shirt is seen walking away from the ball, which has rolled further down the field. The players in orange shirts continue to move, with one running towards the ball and another positioning themselves. The overall scene remains lively and active, reflecting the ongoing casual soccer match in the sunny, suburban setting.
